items.example: The audience for some YouTube videos may be bigger than for some TV programmes.
The creators of the videos are often normal people like us, the consumers.
Our target audience is anyone interested in science.
We will upload new videos once a month.
I'd never subscribe to a YouTube channel.
We are going to create our own video channel.
90% of the content on YouTube is terrible.
Making good quality videos requires a big investment of time and money.
Who are our competitors or rivals in this market?
We are looking for funding to make exciting and innovative videos.
